from alembic.config import Config
from alembic.script import ScriptDirectory

cfg = Config\('alembic.ini'\)
sd = ScriptDirectory.from_config\(cfg\)
revisions = list\(sd.walk_revisions\(\)\)
for rev in reversed\(revisions\):
    print\(f'{rev.revision} -> {rev.down_revision}  [{rev.doc}]'\)
" 2>&1)

from app.models import Account, AccountRole
from app.db.base import Base

# Check table name and columns
tbl = Account.__table__
print\('Table:', tbl.name\)
print\('Columns:', [c.name for c in tbl.columns]\)
print\('Constraints:', [c.name for c in tbl.constraints]\)

# Smoke-test ORM-level email normalization
a = Account.__new__\(Account\)
result = a._normalize_email\(None, '  Test@Example.COM  '\)
print\('Email normalized:', result\)

# Smoke-test role validation
r = a._validate_role\(None, 'super_admin'\)
print\('Role validated:', r\)

# Smoke-test invalid role returns None
r_invalid = a._validate_role\(None, 'root'\)
print\('Invalid role returns:', r_invalid\)

# AccountRole enum values
print\('AccountRole values:', [e.value for e in AccountRole]\)
